entities.name: meeting-auto-process
entities.context: Command/script that automatically processes meeting transcripts and generates structured output

entities.name: Action Items
entities.context: Generated deliverable containing 10-20 items with owners, deadlines, and priorities

entities.name: Decisions
entities.context: Generated deliverable capturing 5-8 key decisions with rationale

entities.name: Key Insights
entities.context: Generated deliverable with 10-15 strategic insights on hiring, wellness, product themes

entities.name: Follow-up Email
entities.context: Draft email with specific next steps generated from meeting content

entities.name: REVIEW_FIRST
entities.context: Executive dashboard with priority actions - entry point for reviewing meeting output

entities.name: Warm Intros
entities.context: Intelligence block identifying warm introduction opportunities mentioned in meetings

entities.name: Risks
entities.context: Intelligence block capturing identified risks and concerns from discussions

entities.name: Intelligence Blocks
entities.context: Category of conditionally-generated meeting outputs stored in INTELLIGENCE subfolder

relationships.context: Produces action items as part of standard output
Produces decisions block as part of standard output
Produces insights as part of standard output
Produces stakeholder profiles as part of standard output
Produces draft follow-up email as part of standard output
Produces executive dashboard as entry point
Conditionally produces when introductions are mentioned
Conditionally produces when risks are discussed
Action items are part of core always-generated outputs
Decisions are part of core always-generated outputs
Insights are part of core always-generated outputs
Warm intros are conditional intelligence outputs
